name: Andiramon (Deva)

signature_move.name: Asipatravana
signature_move.description: Spins like a tornado with its body as the axis, cutting anything surrounding it with theBǎo Fǔon its hands.

description: One of the " Deva Digimon", it is a Perfect Digimon with a form resembling the Rabbit . As a follower of the Four Holy Beasts Digimon Qinglongmon , it is the owner of a gentle spirit. It likes small things, and because it attends to them with profound tenderness, if anything appears that tries to tread on them then its personality is completely reversed, and it attacks with the Bǎo Fǔ which transformed its hands into razor-sharp axes. Once a cut is made, it won't stop spreading until the enemy's form is no more. Its Special Move is spinning like a tornado with its body as the axis, cutting anything surrounding it with the Bǎo Fǔ on its hands ( Asipatravana ).
